text: During darkness, a vehicle shall be equipped with lighted lighting equipment as required for the vehicle by this chapter.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 12. EQUIPMENT OF VEHICLES [24000 - 28244]
### Chapter 2. Lighting Equipment [24250 - 26106]
#### Article 1. General Provisions [24250 - 24255]
##### § 24250

During darkness, a vehicle shall be equipped with lighted lighting equipment as required for the vehicle by this chapter.

*(Enacted by Stats. 1959, Ch. 3.)*

subsections.text: During darkness, a vehicle shall be equipped with lighted lighting equipment as required for the vehicle by this chapter.
